entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop being studied for resistance to shoot fly.

entities.name: SHOOT FLY
entities.description: The pest Atherigona soccata that attacks sorghum seedlings.

entities.name: LEAF SURFACE WETNESS
entities.description: Wetness on the central whorl leaf of sorghum seedlings associated with shoot fly susceptibility.

entities.name: SUSCEPTIBILITY
entities.description: The vulnerability of sorghum genotypes to shoot fly attack.

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum genotypes to resist shoot fly attack.

entities.name: RADIOACTIVE LABELLING
entities.description: Technique using radioactive isotopes to track movement of water and solutes in plants.

entities.name: TRITIUM
entities.description: A radioactive isotope of hydrogen used to track water translocation to the leaf surface.

entities.name: CARBON-14
entities.description: A radioactive isotope of carbon used to detect solutes in leaf surface water.

entities.name: CSH 5
entities.description: A sorghum genotype identified as susceptible to shoot fly.

entities.name: IS 18551
entities.description: A sorghum genotype identified as resistant to shoot fly.
